name: axios cancel request
prompt: Create a file named http-client.ts in the current directory. Export a TypeScript function fetchWithCancel(url: string) that uses axios to make a cancellable HTTP GET request. Use the axios.CancelToken API to support cancellation — create a CancelToken.source(), pass source.token in the axios config, and return { promise, cancel: () => source.cancel() }. Write the file now.
